name: 20260417120000_silenced_condition_homebrew_overlay
query:
-- Move Silenced condition out of shared rules catalog into campaign homebrew_overlays (green-hunger).

insert into public.homebrew_overlays (campaign_id, entity_type, canonical_ref, overlay_payload, is_active)
select c.id,
  'condition',
  'silenced',
  '{"name":"Silenced","summary":"Cannot cast spells with verbal components.","colour":"#7090b0"}'::jsonb,
  true
from public.campaigns c
where c.slug = 'green-hunger'
  and not exists (
    select 1
    from public.homebrew_overlays ho
    where ho.campaign_id = c.id
      and ho.entity_type = 'condition'
      and ho.canonical_ref = 'silenced'
  );
